_comment: Production release gates (09_TEST_QUALITY.md §5, checklists/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md). 'pass' = satisfied and CI-verifiable now; 'blocked' = launch blocker pending real-world activity (corpus, devices, audits). tools/ci/release_gate.py blocks release while any mandatory gate is not 'pass'.

gates.name: Hard-contradiction property tests pass
No wrong high-confidence in synthetic holdout
Zero wrong high-confidence in >=3000-line independent real holdout (>=500 products, >=30 templates)
Direction grammar exact-match gate
gates.note: engine:parser DirectionParserTest; real-scan exact-match >=99.5% pending corpus

gates.name: Key/redaction/delete/temp-lifecycle unit tests pass
Manifest signature + tamper + rollback/revocation drill
Repository policy check (no analytics/ads, no INTERNET)
Fixed medical copy has no banned wording
Photographed direction separated from official info
Network capture has no prescription/OCR data
Backup/device-transfer leakage test passes
gates.note: config in place (allowBackup=false, exclusions); needs device test

gates.name: UI: review-not-bypassable, TalkBack, large font, rotation, stale banners, delete-all
gates.note: logic unit-tested; full instrumentation needs emulator/device

gates.name: Airplane-mode first-run OCR on device
gates.note: ML Kit bundled model; needs device verification

gates.name: Device/OEM test matrix executed
Penetration test findings resolved or accepted
SBOM, dependency, license, vulnerability review
Pharmacist sign-off on fixed medical copy
Regulatory applicability review completed
Privacy policy published and reviewed
gates.note: published at https://jeiel85.github.io/rxscan-android/privacy.html; pending contact email + legal review before pass

gates.name: Play Data safety form matches build behavior
Staged rollout + incident owner configured
Crash-free internal beta target measured (no health payloads)
